## etude capture

Capture a stage artifact into an etude run

```
etude capture <stage> [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --git-sha string            repo git sha for this stage
      --harness string            agent runtime that executed the stage (e.g. claude-code)
      --harness-version string    version of the agent runtime
  -h, --help                      help for capture
      --input stringArray         input artifact as role=path
      --message string            run ref commit message
      --model string              LLM model used by this stage (e.g. claude-opus-4-7)
      --output stringArray        output artifact as role=path
      --produced-by string        producer identity (default "original")
      --ref stringArray           external ref as key=value
      --run string                run id to capture into
      --skill-id string           skill id
      --skill-repo string         skill repo (default "manual")
      --skill-version string      skill version (default "manual")
      --workflow string           workflow name (default "manual")
      --workflow-version string   workflow version (default "manual-v1")
```
